name: CAPITAL CITY BANK GROUP INC
summary: Capital City Bank Group Inc (CCBG) is a financial holding company operating through its banking subsidiary, Capital City Bank. The company provides a range of banking products and services including commercial banking, retail banking, and related financial services. It operates primarily in the southeastern United States, serving individuals, businesses, and institutional customers.

products.name: Commercial Banking
products.description: Commercial lending and deposit services for business customers.

products.name: Retail Banking
products.description: Consumer deposit accounts, loans, and related financial services for individuals.
